title: HOME FREE - 211info
text: NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE HOME FREE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bus tickets via Greyhound to transport eligible individuals from where they currently are to a location where family or a safe adult is. Locations must be accessible by Greyhound transportation services. 4849 N Milwaukee Avenue Suite 700 Chicago, IL 60630 Eligibility: Ages 12-21 who are away from home and do not have a safe way to return Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 786-2929 1-800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (773) 880-9860 Administration (800) 786-2929 Hotline 1-800-RUNAWAY 66008 Text Short Code Hotline (800) 786-2929 1-800-RUNAWAY Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Identification such as Photo ID or birth certificate LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Return to Point of Origin * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTALLY OVERCOMING CHALLENGES AND ADVERSITY SAFELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE
